content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market open with Day 4 of experiment. Book is 68% deployed with -0.75% session P&L. Most holdings are showing modest gains in the underlying stocks (MAHABANK +5.57%, PNBHOUSING +9.19%, TORNTPOWER +2.97%, AUBANK +4.65%, HINDUNILVR +6.03%) but entries were at higher prices yesterday so small unrealized losses persist. INFY Q4 results today is a major event. Priority is setting proper SLs on all existing positions (currently 0.00!) and cleaning up stale pending orders — not adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 results (+34.89% PAT YoY, NNPA 0.13%), 52-week high breakout, PSU bank leadership. Thesis intact. Setting SL below prior swing low of 72.31 with buffer → 75 (~8% below entry but protects against breakout failure). Target 88 aligns with breakout extension. Risk-reward favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Record PAT +18.3%, GNPA below 1%, JPM TP 1000, +9% rally today. Strong fundamentals + breakout. SL at 935 below recent consolidation, target 1080 offers ~10% upside. R:R ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Gold supported by central bank buying, INR weakness, geopolitical risk. SL 118.50 below 20-SMA (121.92) and prior support. Target 135 (~8% upside) given constructive setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1555.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "52-week high breakout with volume. Power sector strength. SL at 1555 (near recent support 1551) caps risk at ~5.7%. Target 1800 for ~9% upside. Nabha Power integration + Q4 earnings May 13 as catalysts."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1330.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 (+27% PAT, +23% revenue, +18% volume) at 52-week high. Entered at 1412 ahead of the open — CMP has pulled back. SL 1330 (~5.8% below entry), target 1500 (~6% upside). Rich valuation caps upside but momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 985.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 provisional (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Q4 audited results Apr 25-27 is near-term catalyst. SL 985 below recent base (978-984 range). Target 1130 for ~8% upside. Exit before or at results if unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "At 52-week high with volume. Q4 results Apr 29. ICICI Direct TP 770. SL 640 (~6% below entry) below prior breakout. Target 745 for ~9% upside. Event-driven — must decide before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2240.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation, +6% today. Q4 results April 30 is binary event. SL 2240 (~5.6% below entry), target 2520 (~6.2% upside). Exit if not hit before April 30 to avoid event risk, or if SL triggers."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already holding TORNTPOWER in power cluster. Combined power exposure would exceed cluster discipline rules. ADANIPOWER BUY limit at 214 from prior session is already OPEN. However, CMP 215.30 and +35% April rally = stretched. Preserving cluster discipline — CANCEL rather than stack. See cancel in notes."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY limit at 404.50 from prior session. Already have TORNTPOWER in power cluster; adding NTPC would create 3-name power cluster exposure. Per cluster discipline, avoid stacking. Should be cancelled (see portfolio_notes)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Results today at 3:45 PM IST — binary event. HCLTECH already showed -9% post-result reaction. Do NOT enter pre or post binary event without clear setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Catching a -9.93% falling knife on weak FY27 guidance. Bearish sector sentiment into INFY results today. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 1475 is positive but stock already +4.11% near that price. Macquarie TP 1050 creates overhang. Limited R:R at current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 25 — binary event in 2 days. Near 52-week high. Pass on event-driven entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 29 is binary risk. Book already 68% deployed with financials exposure (PNBHOUSING, MAHABANK, AUBANK). Cluster concentration concern."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high after +12% 2-day rally. Chase risk. Adding to already-heavy financial cluster."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+16% chase move without clear catalyst visibility. Book capacity limited."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Capital goods name with strong volume but book already near deployment limit. Preserve cash buffer."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "Set initial SL at 75 below key support; target 88 on breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "reasoning": "SL below recent consolidation, target 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — wide SL, gold macro intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1555.00,
      "reasoning": "SL near recent support, target 1800."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1330.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-result strength, SL below gap zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 985.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Apr 25-27 results; tight SL protects."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Apr 29 earnings; tight SL; plan to exit before results if near target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2240.00,
      "reasoning": "Exit before Apr 30 event if SL/target not triggered."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INFY — watch post-result price action today for oversold bounce setup next session, only if FY27 guidance not materially worse than 2-4% consensus. AUROPHARMA — revisit near 1375-1400 if market offers dip below buyback level. AXISBANK/BAJFINANCE — wait for post-results reaction for cleaner entries. PSU Bank strength may rotate into PSUBNKBEES as diversified expression vs adding single-stock risk.",
  "portfolio_notes": "CRITICAL HYGIENE ITEMS: (1) Two stale OPEN orders from yesterday (ADANIPOWER CNC BUY 214, NTPC CNC BUY 404.50) — both should be CANCELLED because power cluster is already represented by TORNTPOWER and stacking violates cluster discipline. The execution layer should cancel these. (2) All 8 existing positions had SL=0 — critical oversight from yesterday; rectified this tick. (3) Book at 68% deployed — at hysteresis threshold; default disposition NO_ACTION on new entries, focus on risk management. (4) Financial exposure (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK) is ~35% of capital — at cluster cap. No more financials. (5) INFY results today after close creates tail risk for broad market Friday; prefer defensive posture."
}
